name: OpenStreetMap
description: Open map database updated & maintained via open collaboration
value: To create detailed street network & transportation Infra map supporting real-time transport routing & navigations

name: Quantum Geographic Information System
description: An open source software to create, edit, analyz, and visualize & publish geospatial data
value: To create custom maps of urban transportation infra, visualize traffic patterns, spatially analyse transportation traffic & generate heat map of mobility patterns

name: Leaflet
value: To create realtime transit tracking maps, developing route planning & navigation interfaces

name: GRASS GIS
description: A geographic information system used for geospatial data management, image processing, graphics, spatial modeling, and visualization
value: Teraain analysis for transport infra, network assessment & routing, spatial staticts & modeling urban mobility patterns

name: DIVA-GIS
value: Supporting regional transportation planning, visualising demographic data & basic spatial analysis

name: Natual Earth
description: Free vector & raster map dataat different scape sa country borders, rivers, physical features like mountains
value:
Regional transportation network visualization, continential mobility pattern
Download ready-made datasets (like countries and major rivers) and import them into a tool like QGIS to style or customize the map.

name: Kepler.gl
value: Interactive mapping & visualization, Urban Mobility and Transport Analysis etc

name:
OpenMobilityData
Formely known as transitfeed
description: Platform that aggregates and provides access to GTFS (General Transit Feed Specification) data from public transit agencies worldwide
value: For Developing an application with transit schedule/map,  route planning support and real-time arrival updates across different transit agencies

name: Transitland
description: Collects and aggregates transit data from various providers around the world, making it accessible through open APIs for developers
value: For developing app that require transit data, create maps to show transit routes, map location, transit pattern, etc

name: MATSim (Multi-Agent Transport Simulation Toolkit)
description: Simulating agent based modules intended for use with transportation planning models
value: To develop scenerio simulation for transport demand modeeling i.e.the movements of persons (agents) and vehicles on a given road and public transport network

name: SUMO (Simulation of Urban Mobility)
description: Open source traffic simulation package to model and analyze traffic flow and mobility in urban areas
value: Develop microscopic traffic simulation, multi-modal network modeling & detailed vehicle interaction simulation

name: OpenTraffic
description: Software and data platform for sharing and analyzing traffic statistics
value: Realtime traffic monitoring, Urban mobility data processing &  Open-source traffic analytics

name: SimMobility
description: Integrated mobility simulation platform that comprehensively simulates Future Mobility scenarios by integrating long, medium, and short-term travel behavior
value: Mobility-sensitive behavioral models, the platform simulates the effects of a portfolio of technology, policy and investment options under alternative future scenario

name: Open Mobility Foundation
description: Manages cities-wide transportation by building open-source data standards and software
value: Developing shared mobility data standards, Facilitating inter-city transportation technology integration

name: BRouter
description: used for offline navigation, primarily known for its integration with OpenStreetMap data
value: Open-source routing engine specialized for hiking, cycling, and outdoor routing

name: Open Source Routing Machine (OSRM)
value:
Fastest route calculation
Road network navigation
Location-based services
Transportation planning

description:
Open technology provides an opportunity for various stakeholders to collaborate efforts to improve public transit.

Elements of open technology include:

Open standards
Open data
Open source software (both as consumer-facing apps like OpenTripPlanner and developer tools like the GTFS Validator)
value: Community list of data standards, APIs, apps, tools, datasets, and research around open source technology of public transit.

group: DRIVER - Data for Road Incident Visualization, Evaluation, and Reporting
name: DRIVER
